ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the work class */,
  "is_private_sector" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the work class is in the private sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., Computer Science, Engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Adm-clerical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the occupation is most common (e.g., IT, Healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Never-married) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range description (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income category */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the income range */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gains" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for capital gain */,
  "gain_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of capital gain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the capital gain */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the capital gain occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the capital gain (e.g., stock market, real estate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for capital loss */,
  "loss_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of capital loss */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the capital loss */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the capital loss occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the capital loss (e.g., stock market, real estate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for work hour entry */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the work hour entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the work week */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the work week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id")
)
